settings_external_auth_links_section_des: Review external identities linked to this account. After unlinking, that identity can no longer sign directly into this account.
settings_external_auth_links_empty_desc: After an external sign-in flow links an identity, it will appear here.
settings_external_auth_links_delete_desc: After unlinking, this external identity can no longer sign directly into the current account. If automatic linking is enabled, a later eligible sign-in may link it again.
